article_meta.title: President Donald Trump said Wednesday he wants negotiations to acquire Greenland, portraying the effort as a strategic n

reasoning: The summary consistently attributes charged claims to Trump and avoids adopting the article’s or Trump’s loaded framing as objective fact. Language is neutral, with verbs like “argued,” “asserted,” and “claimed,” and includes no sensational or subjective phrasing. Perspectives match the source’s one-sided presentation.

custom_reasoning.spin: Uses neutral, attributive verbs (argued, asserted, claimed) rather than adopting loaded language.
custom_reasoning.unsubstantiated_claims: Contested points are clearly presented as Trump’s claims; no unsupported assertions by the model.
custom_reasoning.opinion_as_fact: No subjective judgments are stated in the model’s voice; evaluative content is attributed to Trump.
custom_reasoning.sensationalism: Tone is measured and avoids dramatic or alarming language.
custom_reasoning.mudslinging: No personal attacks or pejoratives introduced by the model.
custom_reasoning.mind_reading: No claims about motives or intentions beyond what Trump stated.
custom_reasoning.slant: Reflects the single perspective present in the source without overemphasis.
custom_reasoning.bias_by_omission: Captures all major points present in the article (security rationale, no force, WWII reference, tariffs, NATO).
custom_reasoning.negativity_bias: Does not amplify negative elements beyond the source’s content.
custom_reasoning.elite_populist_bias: No preferential treatment of elites or grassroots beyond source content.
custom_reasoning.framing_neutrality: Clearly more neutral than the source/trumpian framing, with careful attribution.
custom_reasoning.perspective_completeness: Accurately reflects the single perspective offered in the article; no missing viewpoints from the source.
